sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106357" key="u(dra/rpac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδράρπαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106357.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλεψύδρα</ref> </xr> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Holm.:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:524:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">524.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
